body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule E 2025 tax adjustments and credits.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.E-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule E numeric source values for encoded amounts, rates, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 85
Value: 0.85
Value: 100

Schedule E Part A calculates tax adjustment and credits. Line 405 adds line 401 income tax on taxable income and line 402 tax adjustment for a single payment accrued to December 31, 1971. Line 412 adds line 406 non-refundable tax credits, line 409 foreign tax credit, and line 411 tax credit for the beneficiary of a designated trust. Line 413 subtracts line 412 from line 405 and carries the result to TP-1 line 413; the form instructs taxpayers to enter a minus sign if the result is negative.

Schedule E Part B calculates adjustment of income tax payable. Line 12 subtracts line 431 from line 430 and floors the result at zero. Line 14 subtracts alternative minimum tax carry-over from line 12 and floors the result at zero. Line 16 enters the greater of line 14 and line 15 alternative minimum tax from form TP-776.42-V. Line 18 subtracts the deduction for logging tax from line 16 and carries the result to TP-1 line 432.

Schedule E Part C calculates the property tax refund for forest producers. Line 23 adds current-year eligible development expenses and the unused portion of eligible development expenses. For each assessment unit, line 29 is the land value divided by total unit value and multiplied by 100. Line 30 multiplies property taxes paid in 2025 and not refunded by line 29. Line 31 is total eligible property taxes for all assessment units. Line 32 enters the lesser of line 23 and line 31. Line 60 multiplies line 32 by 85% and carries the property tax refund for forest producers to TP-1 line 462.
